ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "big_size" TEXT /* Big size category (e.g., 1XB, 2XB) */,
  "neck" TEXT /* Neck size range */,
  "chest" TEXT /* Chest size range */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist size range */,
  "sleeve" TEXT /* Sleeve length */,
  "body_type" TEXT /* Body type (e.g., Slim, Regular, Athletic) */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip size range */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam length */,
  "shoulder" TEXT /* Shoulder width */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the sizing information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the product is designed */,
  "season" TEXT /* Seasonal category */,
  "size_chart_url" TEXT /* URL to a detailed size chart for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Shirts, Jackets) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the category is designed */,
  "season" TEXT /* Seasonal category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "stock_level" INTEGER /* Current stock level for the product in this size */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the stock is located */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery for reordered items */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the store */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the store is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the store location */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_store_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, sales associate, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the sale */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size sold */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale was made */,
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* ID of the discount applied */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_discount_id FOREIGN KEY ("discount_id") REFERENCES discounts ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report generation */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales in the report period */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated in the report period */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the store is located */,
  "total_returns" INTEGER /* Total number of returns in the report period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the discount applies to */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the discount is applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the return was made */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size of the returned product */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store manager who handled the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_store_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
